name: multi-model-team
description: Marketplace for the multi-model-team plugin — delegate token-heavy work to a local agy (Gemini) CLI with dynamic routing, multi-agent /team fan-out, and a statusline HUD.

plugins.name: multi-model-team
plugins.description: Delegates token-heavy, self-contained tasks to local CLI backends (agy/Gemini today; codex/opencode pluggable) chosen by task size and type, with credit-exhaustion fallback to native Claude and a glanceable statusline HUD. All config lives in a single JSON file where backends and agents are first-class and individually enable/disable-able. /team runs a decompose → dispatch (parallel agy + native) → verify → fix → synthesize pipeline; an optional config-gated UserPromptSubmit hook can proactively nudge delegation.
